notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas flies out to center fielder Byron Buxton.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Byron Buxton batting, Austin Martin picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, second baseman Jonathan India.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Brooks Lee out at 2nd. Trevor Larnach out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach GIDP
